briefdescription.para: Single-char level labels: T=Trace, D=Debug, I=Info, W=Warn, E=Error, F=Fatal.

detaileddescription.para: Set to 1 in syn_config.h to enable ANSI color codes.
Output goes directly to syn_port_serial_write — no callback needed.

parameterdescription.para: Minimum runtime log level (messages below this are suppressed at runtime). Compile-time level still applies.

briefdescription.para: Change the runtime minimum log level.
Get the current runtime minimum log level.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_LogLevel level, const char *tag, const char *fmt, va_list args)
memberdef.name: syn_log_va

detaileddescription.para: Normally called via the SYN_LOG_* macros rather than directly.

briefdescription.para: Output a raw string with no formatting or prefix.

detaileddescription.para: Useful for printing hex dumps, tables, or other pre-formatted data that shouldn't get a timestamp/level prefix.

briefdescription.para: Hex dump utility — output a buffer as hex + ASCII.
